password_plaintext.description: The password in plaintext used for some services. It is autogenerated if not provided.

deploy_timestamp.description: The deploy timestamp in the format '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' (e.g. 2021-01-01 00:00:00), it is autogenerated. It used to tag deployments with the timestamp.

default_x509_cert_secret.description: The default x509 cert secret secret name

cluster_hash.description: The cluster hash, it is a md5 hash of the cluster name (first 6 characters), it is used to generate unique names.

gcp_dir.description: The directory where the gcp artifacts are stored

private_key_file.description: The private key file, it is used to connect to the GCP instances.

templates_dir.description: The directory where the templates are stored

build_dir.description: The directory where the build artifacts are stored

k8s_dir.description: The directory where the k8s artifacts are stored

helm_dir.description: The directory where the helm artifacts are stored

destroy_cluster.description: Enable Destroy the cluster when the deploy fails

elastic_apm_verify_server_cert.description: Enable Verify the APM server certificates

helm_charts_dir.description: The directory where the helm charts are stored

deployment_dir.description: The directory where the deployment (docker, heln, k8s, bootstrap,...) are stored

k8s_deployment_dir.description: The directory where the k8s deployment manifests are stored

helm_deployment_dir.description: The directory where the helm deployment values are stored

synthetics_deployments_dir.description: The directory where the synthetics deployment values are stored

ingress_nginx_namespace.description: The namespace where the ingress-nginx is installed

grab_cluster_info.description: Enable Grab the cluster info and store it on a secret.

save_secrets.description: Enable Save the secrets on the secret manager

oblt_username.description: The username who owns the cluster

cluster_readme_url.description: The URL template for the cluster README

cluster_seed.description: The seed for random values, it is used in names in tests to be unique, it is unique per execution.

bootstrap_username.description: The username to bootstrap the cluster

bootstrap_password.description: The password to bootstrap the cluster

default_bootstrap_dir.description: The directory where the bootstrap deployment values are stored

secret_root_gcsm.description: The GCSM secrets root path for all clusters secrets

secret_base_gcsm.description: The GCSM secrets base path, it is based on the cluster name

credentials_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster credentials secret name

elastic_stack_env_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster env secret name

deploy_info_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster deploy-info secret name

kibana_yml_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster kibana-yml secret name

cluster_state_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster state secret name

activate_gcsm_def_secret.description: The GCSM cluster activate k8s script secret name

kibana_purge_enabled.description: Enable Kibana index purge, deletes the old indice, after reindex the object in the new one.

observability_enabled.description: Enable Observability, it sends the logs, metrics and traces to a observability deployment.

observability_secret.description: The name of the secret with the credentials for the observability deployment.

observability_transaction_sample_rate.description: The transaction sample rate for the observability configuration.

observability_metrics_interval.description: The metrics interval for the observability configuration.

observability_log_level.description: The log level for the observability configuration.

observability_ci_secret.description: The name of the secret with the credentials for the observability CI deployment.
